---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-section}
# Institutional Alpha
### S&P 500 Sector-Neutral Walk-Forward
<p>Trade the open. Let factors decide.</p>
:::

<h2 class="section-title">Key Performance Indicators</h2>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-icon}
<i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
:::
::: {.metric-value}
78.13%
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Total Return
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-icon}
<i class="fas fa-gem"></i>
:::
::: {.metric-value}
0.92
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Sharpe Ratio
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-icon}
<i class="fas fa-percentage"></i>
:::
::: {.metric-value}
14.36%
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Annualized Return
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-icon}
<i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
:::
::: {.metric-value}
-16.36%
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Max Drawdown
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-icon}
<i class="fas fa-bullseye"></i>
:::
::: {.metric-value}
53.78%
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Daily Hit Rate
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-icon}
<i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
:::
::: {.metric-value}
51.94%
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Trade Success Rate
:::
:::
:::

:::

<h2 class="section-title">Performance Analysis</h2>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.chart-container}
<h4><i class="fas fa-chart-area"></i> Cumulative Equity Curve</h4>
![](output/cumulative_returns.png){width="100%"}
*Strategy vs. SPY Benchmark (2022-2026)*
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.chart-container}
<h4><i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i> Drawdown Profile</h4>
![](output/drawdown.png){width="100%"}
*Historical Risk/Volatility Exposure*
:::
:::

:::

<h2 class="section-title">Recent Trade Blotter</h2>

::: {.data-table-container}
<div class="scrollable-table">
| Trade ID | Signal Date | Ticker | Sector | Entry Price | Exit Price | Return % | Fate |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 32 | 2022-01-03 | ALB | Materials | 239.02 | 240.00 | 0.41% | success |
| 15 | 2022-01-03 | AMP | Financials | 308.54 | 323.20 | 4.75% | success |
| 28 | 2022-01-03 | ANET | Info Tech | 35.56 | 34.50 | -3.00% | stop-loss |
| 23 | 2022-01-03 | AOS | Industrials | 83.77 | 85.01 | 1.48% | success |
| 3 | 2022-01-03 | AZO | Cons Disc | 2058.19 | 2075.00 | 0.82% | success |
| 8 | 2022-01-03 | COST | Cons Stap | 564.23 | 563.69 | -0.10% | timeout |
| 16 | 2022-01-03 | CVS | Health Care | 104.45 | 104.32 | -0.12% | timeout |
| 9 | 2022-01-03 | DVN | Energy | 46.27 | 48.15 | 4.06% | success |
| 22 | 2022-01-03 | EFX | Industrials | 285.38 | 288.98 | 1.26% | success |
| 37 | 2022-01-03 | EXC | Utilities | 40.37 | 40.66 | 0.71% | success |
| 35 | 2022-01-03 | EXR | Real Estate | 219.36 | 220.81 | 0.66% | success |
| 5 | 2022-01-03 | F | Cons Disc | 22.52 | 24.06 | 6.84% | success |
| 36 | 2022-01-03 | FE | Utilities | 41.27 | 40.99 | -0.68% | timeout |
| 14 | 2022-01-03 | FITB | Financials | 45.07 | 46.88 | 4.02% | success |
| 30 | 2022-01-03 | FTNT | Info Tech | 66.10 | 64.12 | -3.00% | stop-loss |
| 1 | 2022-01-03 | GOOGL | Comm Serv | 145.40 | 144.42 | -0.67% | timeout |
| 2 | 2022-01-03 | HD | Cons Disc | 408.64 | 414.00 | 1.31% | success |
| 17 | 2022-01-03 | IQV | Health Care | 272.62 | 264.44 | -3.00% | stop-loss |
| 29 | 2022-01-03 | IT | Info Tech | 322.93 | 320.77 | -0.67% | timeout |
| 25 | 2022-01-03 | JCI | Industrials | 79.95 | 80.35 | 0.50% | success |
</div>
:::

<h2 class="section-title">Strategy Methodology</h2>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.methodology-box}
### Entry Logic
The strategy employs a **Sector-Neutral** framework to eliminate macro-sector biases and focus on idiosyncratic alpha. 

*   **Universe**: S&P 500 constituents.
*   **Factor Library**: IC-weighted combination of Momentum (12m and 3m), Proximity to 52-week High, and Trend Quality.
*   **Optimization**: 3-year rolling walk-forward training window to adapt to regime shifts.
*   **Selection**: Daily rebalancing into the top 10% of stocks within each sector.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.methodology-box}
### Risk Management
Strict risk controls are embedded to preserve capital and ensure strategy longevity.

*   **Exit Mechanism**: Daily portfolio rotation ensures exposure is always aligned with the freshest signals.
*   **Stop-Loss**: A hard **3.0%** protective stop-loss triggers an immediate exit if intra-day volatility breaches the threshold.
*   **Fate Tracking**: Every trade is classified as *Success*, *Stop-Loss*, or *Timeout* for rigorous post-trade analysis.
:::
:::

:::

<h2 class="section-title">Monitoring & Robustness</h2>

::: {.methodology-box}
**How do we know if it's working?**
We monitor the **IC Stability**. As long as the realized signal IC remains within 1 standard deviation of our historical mean (~0.05) and the rolling success rate stays above 48%, the model is considered healthy.

**When do we stop?**
A drawdown exceeding **24.5%** (1.5x historical max) or two consecutive 6-month folds with negative excess returns will trigger an automatic strategy halt and factor re-evaluation.
:::

::: {.footer}
Quant Alpha Strategy | Developed for Fintech 533 Final | 2026
:::
